name: Onion Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, melt the Lipton onion butter. Stir in the brown sugar until well combined.
2. Add the cooked sliced carrots and cook, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes or until the carrots are evenly glazed.
Lipton onion butter: Thoroughly blend 1 envelope of Lipton onion soup mix with 1 container (8 oz.) of whipped butter or soft margarine, or use 1/2 pound of butter or margarine, softened. Store covered in the refrigerator.
